title: shangwua denticulata var. denticulata
intro: Shangwua denticulata var. denticulata, also known as Shang Wu, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Shangwua denticulata var. denticulata include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and ointments for various health conditions.
